TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_byacing, title = byacing, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/byacing} }

S.FORM: byacing hya' ga yasa qu sspngan sa ryax na nbkis 'tayal sraral. spngan ryax na Tayal hya' ga cyugal qu kkyalan na Tayal hya, qutux ga nanu' qu hmbku' byacing sawn naha', qutux ga mtbalay byacing sawn naha', ru yaqu mpuzyut byacing sawn naha' la. nanu' qu sawn maha hmbku' byacing hya' ga, aring squ m'uzyut byacing hru, min'aring hmbku' qu byacing lga, ysa qu sawn maha hmbku' byacing. aring sa hmbku' byacing ru tayhuk sa mtbalay byacing ga, yasa qu mrkyas byacing sawn naha', ru mngaygyut krahu' qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' zik na ptbalay byacing sawn naha' la. tayhuk squ ptumaw byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mtbalay byacing la. nanu' qu sawn maha mtbalay byacing hya' ga, mtumaw balay ru mtblaq balay qu skusa naha' maha mtbalay qani hya'. nanu' aring squ mtbalay byacing ru mngaygyut mqlih qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mqlih byacing la, ru tayhuk squ msinrawng qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' msinrawngan qu byacing sawn naha' la. nanu' aring squ msinrawngan byacing ru tayhuk balay sa mskawngat qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mpuyut byacing la. pinqzyuwan kinbkaysan sa zyuwaw na byacing nanu' qu byacing qani ga, kya qutux pinqzyuwan na kinbkaysan sraral. sraral balay hga, minsazing qu wagi' niya' hma, nanu' qu sazing wagi' qasa mga, msaysyuw mhtuw krayryax mru, yasa siy qqlyan krayryax, ungat qu mlhngan niya' ma, maymaw ini' bqbaqiy kwara' na 'tayal maha knwan qu 'abi', knwan qu pptzyuwaw, maymaw mawzyay kwara' qu squliq maki' cinbwanan qani ma, nanu' ana ka qqhuniq ru kk'man uziy lga, yasa siy 'ngaygyut mkzyay lru, ini' 'rkyas kwara' qu pinbahuw na 'tayal la. sawn kasa lga mkayal kwara' qu 'tayal maha ssawn ta' nanu lga musa' mgblaq qu qnqyanux ta' la maha mkal, ru siy kayal qutux qu nbkis naha' maha "twanay ta' sa lawkah balay na mrkyas musa' smbu' sa qutux wagi', kuna yasa la musa' blaq hazi' qnqyanux ta'" maha ru, wzyagan naha' cyugal maymaw mtbalay la inrkyasan na mrkyas mlikuy musa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa ma, nanu' musa' balay qu cyugal hi' mrkyas qasa ma, a pira' kawas lga, 'nyal mbzinah lqu cyugal hi' qasa lma, ga ta qu 'nyal qasa lmga, nyuw maymaw mbukut ru nyuw hmawku' lmru, nyuw maymaw plquy' kwara' saynunux naha' uzi lma, nanu' kmal maha "talagay kintwahiq iyal balay, ini' sami nangi' tayhuk na' ga ini' sami thuzyay mhkangi' la." maha kmayal ma. nanu yasa qu wzyagan naha' lawziy cyugal hi' mrkyas lawziy ma. taqu cyugal hi' qasa mga, siy p'ay'aras qutux hbku' laqi' rasun naha' ma, ru maras bway na yutak niqun naha' tuqiy mru, ki'an naha' pbuling syaw tqtuqiy qu qpuri' na yutak, gi kuna hmbku' babaw niya' ga, aki' naha' niqun mwah mru, aki' naha' siy glgiy qu qbuci' na yutak mwah qalang naha' lawziy ma. nanu' yasa wayal lmruw ini' baqiy ki'a pira' kawas pinhknyan naha' lmga, wal siy huqil na pinhkangi' naha' qu minpanga' hbku' ka cyugal mrkyas qasa lru, nyuw m'mrkyas na mrayrhuw na mlikuy kwara' uziy qu pnanga' naha' ka hbku' qasa uziy lma, nanu' laha' qu smzyunaw sa cyugal hi' minpanga' laha' ka mmawsa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa ma. nanu' yasa siy usa' usa' ruw si kta tayhuk balay squ sawn nbkis tayal maha syaw balay na rhzyal ma, tayhuk kya lmga, pzyux qu bbtunux ka ttlqingan naha' ma, syaw nqu bbtunux qasa mga, yasa wal maymaw ks'zyutan mita' kin zzik balay rngu' ms'ubah tayax qasa ma, nanu' inblayqun naha' kmagaw qu qqbzyangan naha' mru, musa' mskmi' cikay mhngaw na bbu' naha' wagi' iy mhtuw qu wagi' ma. sawn kasa balay min'aring tlapaw qu kayal lga, mttuliq kwara' naha' lru musa' nama' qmbuzyang mnaga' 'uwah na wagi' la, nanu' mn_gaygyut plquy' qu puqing na kayal, ru mn_gaygyut smyax qu kayal uziy, sawn kasa lga, nyux balay mhtuw qu tunux na wagi' la, nanu' squ mhtuw wagi' qasa lmga, nyux siy suling balay rawziq kinsmyax ma! baliy naha' baqun balay lmping pinturing lmgiy maymaw ini' ptgyah balay rawziq rngu' niya' smyax mruw! nanu' qu maki' balay tay glaing qasa hya' mga, siy niya' qmlan squ nyux siy balay suling qasa qu pnayluq niya' mru, "lat!" maha qu bhuniq niya' qasa lmga, tnaq mnaga' sa hngzyang na bun qu wagi' qasa ru ini' si pgyay hiya' ma, ga taqu bays niya' ka sazing hi' qasa hya' lmga, ini' naga' laha' mruw wal siy ihi' pgyay squ tlqingan naha' ka btunux qasa laha' hya' ma, sawn kasa lmga, "pawk!" maha balay cyuw smbu' lqu pnayluq nqu smnbu' qasa lma, siy kta qu "was~!" maha rmpus lqu ramu' na wagi' lma, siy kta qu nyuw balay siy 'pux qu ramu' niya' qasa lma, nanu' kya qu wal niya' rpsan mga, wal maymaw siy ptkalux kwara' ma, nanu' qu smnbu' qasa ka tnaq mnaga' mung sa hngzyang na bun qu wagi' qasa mga, nanu' wayal siy ptkalux na rpsan na ramu' wagi' lma, ru wal si huqil kya hiya' lma, kya qu wayal pkrpus tay babaw kayal hya' lmga, wayal m'bzngah qasa hya' lma, ruw nanu' qu wal bun ka byacing qasa hya' lmga, ini' ksyax iyal lmruw, nanu' yasa qu nyuw ta' ktan ka ini' ksyax iyal ka byacing qasa lma. nanu' balay mwah lqu sazing hi' qasa lmga, yasa siy gluw sa pinmuhi' naha' yutak lmruw, yasa siy qqaniq bway na yutak mwah lruw, tayhuk balay squ qalang naha' lawziy lma. nanu' mwah qalang lmga, ungat ana qutux hi' baq laha' ma, nanu' skayal naha' sa gluw qalang naha' maha "nanu' sami qu tnu' mamu' musa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa." lmga, nanak yaqu mnttnaq ki laha' ka maymaw mbukut rngu' nbkis na squliq qu baq cikay sa laha' qasa ma. anu' aring squ wal naha' bun qutux wagi' lga, kya lqu qlyan squ mlhngan la, ruw blaq kwara' uziy qu pinbahuw kwara' na 'tayal lmruw blaq uziy qaxan naha' uziy lma.

byacing hya' ga yasa qu sspngan sa ryax na nbkis 'tayal sraral. spngan ryax na Tayal hya' ga cyugal qu kkyalan na Tayal hya, qutux ga nanu' qu hmbku' byacing sawn naha', qutux ga mtbalay byacing sawn naha', ru yaqu mpuzyut byacing sawn naha' la. nanu' qu sawn maha hmbku' byacing hya' ga, aring squ m'uzyut byacing hru, min'aring hmbku' qu byacing lga, ysa qu sawn maha hmbku' byacing. aring sa hmbku' byacing ru tayhuk sa mtbalay byacing ga, yasa qu mrkyas byacing sawn naha', ru mngaygyut krahu' qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' zik na ptbalay byacing sawn naha' la. tayhuk squ ptumaw byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mtbalay byacing la. nanu' qu sawn maha mtbalay byacing hya' ga, mtumaw balay ru mtblaq balay qu skusa naha' maha mtbalay qani hya'. nanu' aring squ mtbalay byacing ru mngaygyut mqlih qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mqlih byacing la, ru tayhuk squ msinrawng qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' msinrawngan qu byacing sawn naha' la. nanu' aring squ msinrawngan byacing ru tayhuk balay sa mskawngat qu byacing lga, yasa qu sawn naha' mpuyut byacing la. pinqzyuwan kinbkaysan sa zyuwaw na byacing nanu' qu byacing qani ga, kya qutux pinqzyuwan na kinbkaysan sraral. sraral balay hga, minsazing qu wagi' niya' hma, nanu' qu sazing wagi' qasa mga, msaysyuw mhtuw krayryax mru, yasa siy qqlyan krayryax, ungat qu mlhngan niya' ma, maymaw ini' bqbaqiy kwara' na 'tayal maha knwan qu 'abi', knwan qu pptzyuwaw, maymaw mawzyay kwara' qu squliq maki' cinbwanan qani ma, nanu' ana ka qqhuniq ru kk'man uziy lga, yasa siy 'ngaygyut mkzyay lru, ini' 'rkyas kwara' qu pinbahuw na 'tayal la. sawn kasa lga mkayal kwara' qu 'tayal maha ssawn ta' nanu lga musa' mgblaq qu qnqyanux ta' la maha mkal, ru siy kayal qutux qu nbkis naha' maha "twanay ta' sa lawkah balay na mrkyas musa' smbu' sa qutux wagi', kuna yasa la musa' blaq hazi' qnqyanux ta'" maha ru, wzyagan naha' cyugal maymaw mtbalay la inrkyasan na mrkyas mlikuy musa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa ma, nanu' musa' balay qu cyugal hi' mrkyas qasa ma, a pira' kawas lga, 'nyal mbzinah lqu cyugal hi' qasa lma, ga ta qu 'nyal qasa lmga, nyuw maymaw mbukut ru nyuw hmawku' lmru, nyuw maymaw plquy' kwara' saynunux naha' uzi lma, nanu' kmal maha "talagay kintwahiq iyal balay, ini' sami nangi' tayhuk na' ga ini' sami thuzyay mhkangi' la." maha kmayal ma. nanu yasa qu wzyagan naha' lawziy cyugal hi' mrkyas lawziy ma. taqu cyugal hi' qasa mga, siy p'ay'aras qutux hbku' laqi' rasun naha' ma, ru maras bway na yutak niqun naha' tuqiy mru, ki'an naha' pbuling syaw tqtuqiy qu qpuri' na yutak, gi kuna hmbku' babaw niya' ga, aki' naha' niqun mwah mru, aki' naha' siy glgiy qu qbuci' na yutak mwah qalang naha' lawziy ma. nanu' yasa wayal lmruw ini' baqiy ki'a pira' kawas pinhknyan naha' lmga, wal siy huqil na pinhkangi' naha' qu minpanga' hbku' ka cyugal mrkyas qasa lru, nyuw m'mrkyas na mrayrhuw na mlikuy kwara' uziy qu pnanga' naha' ka hbku' qasa uziy lma, nanu' laha' qu smzyunaw sa cyugal hi' minpanga' laha' ka mmawsa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa ma. nanu' yasa siy usa' usa' ruw si kta tayhuk balay squ sawn nbkis tayal maha syaw balay na rhzyal ma, tayhuk kya lmga, pzyux qu bbtunux ka ttlqingan naha' ma, syaw nqu bbtunux qasa mga, yasa wal maymaw ks'zyutan mita' kin zzik balay rngu' ms'ubah tayax qasa ma, nanu' inblayqun naha' kmagaw qu qqbzyangan naha' mru, musa' mskmi' cikay mhngaw na bbu' naha' wagi' iy mhtuw qu wagi' ma. sawn kasa balay min'aring tlapaw qu kayal lga, mttuliq kwara' naha' lru musa' nama' qmbuzyang mnaga' 'uwah na wagi' la, nanu' mn_gaygyut plquy' qu puqing na kayal, ru mn_gaygyut smyax qu kayal uziy, sawn kasa lga, nyux balay mhtuw qu tunux na wagi' la, nanu' squ mhtuw wagi' qasa lmga, nyux siy suling balay rawziq kinsmyax ma! baliy naha' baqun balay lmping pinturing lmgiy maymaw ini' ptgyah balay rawziq rngu' niya' smyax mruw! nanu' qu maki' balay tay glaing qasa hya' mga, siy niya' qmlan squ nyux siy balay suling qasa qu pnayluq niya' mru, "lat!" maha qu bhuniq niya' qasa lmga, tnaq mnaga' sa hngzyang na bun qu wagi' qasa ru ini' si pgyay hiya' ma, ga taqu bays niya' ka sazing hi' qasa hya' lmga, ini' naga' laha' mruw wal siy ihi' pgyay squ tlqingan naha' ka btunux qasa laha' hya' ma, sawn kasa lmga, "pawk!" maha balay cyuw smbu' lqu pnayluq nqu smnbu' qasa lma, siy kta qu "was~!" maha rmpus lqu ramu' na wagi' lma, siy kta qu nyuw balay siy 'pux qu ramu' niya' qasa lma, nanu' kya qu wal niya' rpsan mga, wal maymaw siy ptkalux kwara' ma, nanu' qu smnbu' qasa ka tnaq mnaga' mung sa hngzyang na bun qu wagi' qasa mga, nanu' wayal siy ptkalux na rpsan na ramu' wagi' lma, ru wal si huqil kya hiya' lma, kya qu wayal pkrpus tay babaw kayal hya' lmga, wayal m'bzngah qasa hya' lma, ruw nanu' qu wal bun ka byacing qasa hya' lmga, ini' ksyax iyal lmruw, nanu' yasa qu nyuw ta' ktan ka ini' ksyax iyal ka byacing qasa lma. nanu' balay mwah lqu sazing hi' qasa lmga, yasa siy gluw sa pinmuhi' naha' yutak lmruw, yasa siy qqaniq bway na yutak mwah lruw, tayhuk balay squ qalang naha' lawziy lma. nanu' mwah qalang lmga, ungat ana qutux hi' baq laha' ma, nanu' skayal naha' sa gluw qalang naha' maha "nanu' sami qu tnu' mamu' musa' smbu' sa wagi' qasa." lmga, nanak yaqu mnttnaq ki laha' ka maymaw mbukut rngu' nbkis na squliq qu baq cikay sa laha' qasa ma. anu' aring squ wal naha' bun qutux wagi' lga, kya lqu qlyan squ mlhngan la, ruw blaq kwara' uziy qu pinbahuw kwara' na 'tayal lmruw blaq uziy qaxan naha' uziy lma.
S.PHON: βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa jas~ɕa qu s~ɕs~ɕpŋan s~ɕa rjax na nβkis~ɕ ʔtajal s~ɕraral. s~ɕpŋan rjax na tajal ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal qu kkjalan na tajal ħja, qutux ɣa nanuʔ qu ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ, qutux ɣa mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ, ru jaqu mpuzjut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ la. nanuʔ qu s~ɕawn maħa ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa, ariŋ s~ɕqu mʔuzjut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħru, minʔariŋ ħmβkuʔ qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, js~ɕa qu s~ɕawn maħa ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ. ariŋ s~ɕa ħmβkuʔ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru tajħuk s~ɕa mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ɣa, jas~ɕa qu mrkjas~ɕ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ, ru mŋajɣjut kraħuʔ qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ zik na ptβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ la. tajħuk s~ɕqu ptumaw βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ la. nanuʔ qu s~ɕawn maħa mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa, mtumaw βalaj ru mtβlaq βalaj qu s~ɕkus~ɕa naħaʔ maħa mtβalaj qani ħjaʔ. nanuʔ ariŋ s~ɕqu mtβalaj βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru mŋajɣjut mqliħ qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ mqliħ βjaʦ~ʨiŋ la, ru tajħuk s~ɕqu ms~ɕinrawŋ qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ ms~ɕinrawŋan qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕawn naħaʔ la. nanuʔ ariŋ s~ɕqu ms~ɕinrawŋan βjaʦ~ʨiŋ ru tajħuk βalaj s~ɕa ms~ɕkawŋat qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ lɣa, jas~ɕa qu s~ɕawn naħaʔ mpujut βjaʦ~ʨiŋ la. pinqzjuwan kinβkajs~ɕan s~ɕa zjuwaw na βjaʦ~ʨiŋ nanuʔ qu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qani ɣa, kja qutux pinqzjuwan na kinβkajs~ɕan s~ɕraral. s~ɕraral βalaj ħɣa, mins~ɕaziŋ qu waɣiʔ nijaʔ ħma, nanuʔ qu s~ɕaziŋ waɣiʔ qas~ɕa mɣa, ms~ɕajs~ɕjuw mħtuw krajrjax mru, jas~ɕa s~ɕij qqljan krajrjax, uŋat qu mlħŋan nijaʔ ma, majmaw iniʔ βqβaqij kwaraʔ na ʔtajal maħa knwan qu ʔaβiʔ, knwan qu pptzjuwaw, majmaw mawzjaj kwaraʔ qu s~ɕquliq makiʔ ʦ~ʨinβwanan qani ma, nanuʔ ana ka qqħuniq ru kkʔman uzij lɣa, jas~ɕa s~ɕij ʔŋajɣjut mkzjaj lru, iniʔ ʔrkjas~ɕ kwaraʔ qu pinβaħuw na ʔtajal la. s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa mkajal kwaraʔ qu ʔtajal maħa s~ɕs~ɕawn taʔ nanu lɣa mus~ɕaʔ mɣβlaq qu qnqjanux taʔ la maħa mkal, ru s~ɕij kajal qutux qu nβkis~ɕ naħaʔ maħa "twanaj taʔ s~ɕa lawkaħ βalaj na mrkjas~ɕ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕa qutux waɣiʔ, kuna jas~ɕa la mus~ɕaʔ βlaq ħaziʔ qnqjanux taʔ" maħa ru, wzjaɣan naħaʔ ʦ~ʨjuɣal majmaw mtβalaj la inrkjas~ɕan na mrkjas~ɕ mlikuj mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕa waɣiʔ qas~ɕa ma, nanuʔ mus~ɕaʔ βalaj qu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ mrkjas~ɕ qas~ɕa ma, a piraʔ kawas~ɕ lɣa, ʔnjal mβzinaħ lqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa lma, ɣa ta qu ʔnjal qas~ɕa lmɣa, njuw majmaw mβukut ru njuw ħmawkuʔ lmru, njuw majmaw plqujʔ kwaraʔ s~ɕajnunux naħaʔ uzi lma, nanuʔ kmal maħa "talaɣaj kintwaħiq ijal βalaj, iniʔ s~ɕami naŋiʔ tajħuk naʔ ɣa iniʔ s~ɕami tħuzjaj mħkaŋiʔ la." maħa kmajal ma. nanu jas~ɕa qu wzjaɣan naħaʔ lawzij ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ mrkjas~ɕ lawzij ma. taqu ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ qas~ɕa mɣa, s~ɕij pʔajʔaras~ɕ qutux ħβkuʔ laqiʔ ras~ɕun naħaʔ ma, ru maras~ɕ βwaj na jutak niqun naħaʔ tuqij mru, kiʔan naħaʔ pβuliŋ s~ɕjaw tqtuqij qu qpuriʔ na jutak, ɣi kuna ħmβkuʔ βaβaw nijaʔ ɣa, akiʔ naħaʔ niqun mwaħ mru, akiʔ naħaʔ s~ɕij ɣlɣij qu qβuʦ~ʨiʔ na jutak mwaħ qalaŋ naħaʔ lawzij ma. nanuʔ jas~ɕa wajal lmruw iniʔ βaqij kiʔa piraʔ kawas~ɕ pinħknjan naħaʔ lmɣa, wal s~ɕij ħuqil na pinħkaŋiʔ naħaʔ qu minpaŋaʔ ħβkuʔ ka ʦ~ʨjuɣal mrkjas~ɕ qas~ɕa lru, njuw mʔmrkjas~ɕ na mrajrħuw na mlikuj kwaraʔ uzij qu pnaŋaʔ naħaʔ ka ħβkuʔ qas~ɕa uzij lma, nanuʔ laħaʔ qu s~ɕmzjunaw s~ɕa ʦ~ʨjuɣal ħiʔ minpaŋaʔ laħaʔ ka mmaws~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕa waɣiʔ qas~ɕa ma. nanuʔ jas~ɕa s~ɕij us~ɕaʔ us~ɕaʔ ruw s~ɕi kta tajħuk βalaj s~ɕqu s~ɕawn nβkis~ɕ tajal maħa s~ɕjaw βalaj na rħzjal ma, tajħuk kja lmɣa, pzjux qu ββtunux ka ttlqiŋan naħaʔ ma, s~ɕjaw nqu ββtunux qas~ɕa mɣa, jas~ɕa wal majmaw ks~ɕʔzjutan mitaʔ kin zzik βalaj rŋuʔ ms~ɕʔuβaħ tajax qas~ɕa ma, nanuʔ inβlajqun naħaʔ kmaɣaw qu qqβzjaŋan naħaʔ mru, mus~ɕaʔ ms~ɕkmiʔ ʦ~ʨikaj mħŋaw na ββuʔ naħaʔ waɣiʔ ij mħtuw qu waɣiʔ ma. s~ɕawn kas~ɕa βalaj minʔariŋ tlapaw qu kajal lɣa, mttuliq kwaraʔ naħaʔ lru mus~ɕaʔ namaʔ qmβuzjaŋ mnaɣaʔ ʔuwaħ na waɣiʔ la, nanuʔ mnɣajɣjut plqujʔ qu puqiŋ na kajal, ru mnɣajɣjut s~ɕmjax qu kajal uzij, s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lɣa, njux βalaj mħtuw qu tunux na waɣiʔ la, nanuʔ s~ɕqu mħtuw waɣiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, njux s~ɕij s~ɕuliŋ βalaj rawziq kins~ɕmjax ma! βalij naħaʔ βaqun βalaj lmpiŋ pinturiŋ lmɣij majmaw iniʔ ptɣjaħ βalaj rawziq rŋuʔ nijaʔ s~ɕmjax mruw! nanuʔ qu makiʔ βalaj taj ɣlaiŋ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ mɣa, s~ɕij nijaʔ qmlan s~ɕqu njux s~ɕij βalaj s~ɕuliŋ qas~ɕa qu pnajluq nijaʔ mru, "lat!" maħa qu βħuniq nijaʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, tnaq mnaɣaʔ s~ɕa ħŋzjaŋ na βun qu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa ru iniʔ s~ɕi pɣjaj ħijaʔ ma, ɣa taqu βajs~ɕ nijaʔ ka s~ɕaziŋ ħiʔ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lmɣa, iniʔ naɣaʔ laħaʔ mruw wal s~ɕij iħiʔ pɣjaj s~ɕqu tlqiŋan naħaʔ ka βtunux qas~ɕa laħaʔ ħjaʔ ma, s~ɕawn kas~ɕa lmɣa, "pawk!" maħa βalaj ʦ~ʨjuw s~ɕmβuʔ lqu pnajluq nqu s~ɕmnβuʔ qas~ɕa lma, s~ɕij kta qu "was~ɕ~!" maħa rmpus~ɕ lqu ramuʔ na waɣiʔ lma, s~ɕij kta qu njuw βalaj s~ɕij ʔpux qu ramuʔ nijaʔ qas~ɕa lma, nanuʔ kja qu wal nijaʔ rps~ɕan mɣa, wal majmaw s~ɕij ptkalux kwaraʔ ma, nanuʔ qu s~ɕmnβuʔ qas~ɕa ka tnaq mnaɣaʔ muŋ s~ɕa ħŋzjaŋ na βun qu waɣiʔ qas~ɕa mɣa, nanuʔ wajal s~ɕij ptkalux na rps~ɕan na ramuʔ waɣiʔ lma, ru wal s~ɕi ħuqil kja ħijaʔ lma, kja qu wajal pkrpus~ɕ taj βaβaw kajal ħjaʔ lmɣa, wajal mʔβzŋaħ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lma, ruw nanuʔ qu wal βun ka βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qas~ɕa ħjaʔ lmɣa, iniʔ ks~ɕjax ijal lmruw, nanuʔ jas~ɕa qu njuw taʔ ktan ka iniʔ ks~ɕjax ijal ka βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qas~ɕa lma. nanuʔ βalaj mwaħ lqu s~ɕaziŋ ħiʔ qas~ɕa lmɣa, jas~ɕa s~ɕij ɣluw s~ɕa pinmuħiʔ naħaʔ jutak lmruw, jas~ɕa s~ɕij qqaniq βwaj na jutak mwaħ lruw, tajħuk βalaj s~ɕqu qalaŋ naħaʔ lawzij lma. nanuʔ mwaħ qalaŋ lmɣa, uŋat ana qutux ħiʔ βaq laħaʔ ma, nanuʔ s~ɕkajal naħaʔ s~ɕa ɣluw qalaŋ naħaʔ maħa "nanuʔ s~ɕami qu tnuʔ mamuʔ mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕmβuʔ s~ɕa waɣiʔ qas~ɕa." lmɣa, nanak jaqu mnttnaq ki laħaʔ ka majmaw mβukut rŋuʔ nβkis~ɕ na s~ɕquliq qu βaq ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕa laħaʔ qas~ɕa ma. anuʔ ariŋ s~ɕqu wal naħaʔ βun qutux waɣiʔ lɣa, kja lqu qljan s~ɕqu mlħŋan la, ruw βlaq kwaraʔ uzij qu pinβaħuw kwaraʔ na ʔtajal lmruw βlaq uzij qaxan naħaʔ uzij lma.
